items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes around facilitating well-being through bodily practice, embracing body experiences for pain interpretation, and creating safe alliances with children.
items.curatedReason: 处理脑瘫儿童疼痛是个复杂问题，但这项定性研究提示我们，在治疗中建立安全同盟、帮助孩子理解自身身体体验、并以此促进他们的整体幸福感至关重要。你或许该审视一下，自己的实践中是否充分做到了这几点。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是让生活有意义”：物理治疗师治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师治疗脑瘫（CP）儿童疼痛的经验，发现核心主题包括通过身体治疗促进幸福感、将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的起点，以及基于安全、信任和尊重与儿童建立联盟。
items.curatedReasonEn: Managing pain in children with cerebral palsy is complex. This qualitative study suggests that establishing a safe therapeutic alliance, helping children interpret their bodily experiences, and fostering overall well-being are crucial. Reflect on whether your current practice adequately integrates these aspects.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study involved a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), and its findings primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the participants, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summary: This perspective piece argues that while the biopsychosocial (BPS) model is endorsed in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, its implementation often devolves into "biomedical-plus" care. It proposes three foundational conditions—professional Confidence, role Clarity, and Compassionate communication—for physiotherapists to achieve a more authentic BPS application.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼康复中被广泛认可，但实践中常流于形式。这篇文章强调，要真正实现 BPS 模型，你需要提升专业自信（Confidence）、明确角色定位（Clarity）以及运用富有同情心的沟通（Compassionate communication）。这是 PT 深入整合 BPS 的重要一步。
items.titleZh: 超越“生物医学附加”：在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中重申生物心理社会模型。
items.summaryZh: 该述评指出，生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中虽受推崇，但实践常受生物医学假设限制，沦为“生物医学附加”模式。文章提出，物理治疗师可通过提升专业自信、明确角色定位和运用富有同情心的沟通，实现 BPS 模型的真正整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: The biopsychosocial (BPS) model is widely endorsed in musculoskeletal rehabilitation, but often superficially applied. This article emphasizes that truly integrating the BPS model requires you to foster professional Confidence, role Clarity, and Compassionate communication. This is a crucial step for PTs to deepen their BPS practice.
items.limitation: 这是一篇观点述评，不涉及实证研究设计。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece and does not involve empirical study design.
items.journal: Musculoskeletal science & practice

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters, defining reduced tolerance as peak oxygen uptake.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提示，机器学习模型有望在心血管手术患者出院时预测其术后 3 个月的运动能力。这可能帮助我们更早地识别高风险患者，尽管目前仍需更多前瞻性研究来验证其临床实用性。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，该模型利用心血管手术患者出院时的临床参数，预测术后 3 个月运动能力下降的情况，旨在提前识别运动耐量受损风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study suggests machine learning models could predict exercise capacity 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery at hospital discharge. This might help us identify high-risk patients earlier, though more prospective research is needed to validate its clinical utility.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心观察研究，可能存在混杂因素且结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective, single-center observational study, which may have confounding factors and limited generalizability of results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 137 patients referred to advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy found that 70.9% completed full care episodes, exceeding national benchmarks (71% vs. 43%). Among completers, 96% achieved Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 这份回顾性队列研究展现了先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型在提高依从性和改善临床结局方面的潜力。对 PT 执业者而言，这意味着远程医疗不仅是补充，更是有效提升患者参与度、达到 MCI 的可行途径，值得借鉴优化自己的远程服务模式。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的患者参与度、临床结局与满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 137 名转诊至先进骨科虚拟物理治疗的患者回顾性队列研究显示，70.9% 的患者完成了全部疗程，超过全国基准（71% vs. 43%）。在完成者中，96% 达到了最小临床重要差异（MCI）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study highlights the potential of advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy in improving adherence and clinical outcomes. For PT practitioners, this signifies that telehealth is not just supplemental but a viable way to boost patient engagement and achieve MCIDs, offering valuable insights for optimizing your virtual service model.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，且未设置对照组。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may have selection bias and confounding factors, and it lacked a control group.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: This beginner's guide for clinicians explains Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS), a noninvasive brain stimulation technique that modulates brain excitability via subthreshold direct current, highlighting its accessibility and cost-effectiveness for neurorehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇 tDCS 指南专为临床医生设计，详细介绍了其应用原理、优势和局限。如果你正考虑将经颅直流电刺激整合进神经康复实践，这份指南是很好的入门读物，能帮你理解如何有效、安全地使用这一非侵入性脑刺激技术。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生入门指南
items.summaryZh: 这篇面向临床医生的入门指南解释了经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）——一种通过阈下直流电调节大脑兴奋性的非侵入性脑刺激技术，并强调了其在神经康复中的可及性和成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: This tDCS guide for clinicians details its application principles, advantages, and limitations. If you are considering integrating transcranial direct current stimulation into your neurorehabilitation practice, this guide is an excellent starting point to understand how to use this noninvasive brain stimulation technique effectively and safely.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study involving 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 years) found that digital addiction is associated with impaired postural stability and balance control, highlighting the importance of considering this factor in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 长时间使用数字设备与姿势稳定性下降和平衡控制受损相关。这项横断面研究提示数字成瘾对年轻人的姿势平衡有显著影响，在临床评估时需纳入考量，作为宣教和早期干预的依据。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：年轻成人姿势稳定性调查的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 74 名年轻成人（平均年龄 22.06 岁）的横断面研究发现，数字成瘾与姿势稳定性下降和平衡控制受损有关，强调了在康复中考虑这一因素的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prolonged digital device use is linked to reduced postural stability and impaired balance control. This cross-sectional study suggests that digital addiction significantly impacts postural balance in young adults, warranting consideration in clinical assessments to inform education and early intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量相对较小。
items.limitationEn: This study's cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size is relatively small.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped telerehabilitation intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps for stroke survivors transitioning from hospital to home, based on searches from 2000 onwards across PubMed, Web of Science, and PEDro.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述提供了卒中患者居家远程康复干预模型和结局领域的全景，包括了从2000年以来的研究。我们现在对现有实践与未解的证据空白有了更清晰的认识，可据此优化当前的远程康复方案，并指导未来的研究方向。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者从住院到居家过渡期的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述通过对 PubMed、Web of Science 和 PEDro 数据库 2000 年以来的文献检索，识别并梳理了卒中幸存者在从住院到居家过渡期中的远程康复干预模型、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review maps telerehabilitation intervention models and outcome domains for stroke survivors transitioning home, covering studies from 2000 onwards. We now have a clearer picture of current practices and existing evidence gaps, which can help us refine our telerehabilitation programs and guide future research.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质限制了其对干预有效性的深入评估，主要侧重于文献的映射而非证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review limits in-depth evaluation of intervention effectiveness, focusing primarily on mapping literature rather than evidence strength.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicentre cross-sectional study using an online survey (Feb-Jun 2025) in Spain characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilisation profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics for vertigo, dizziness, or unsteadiness.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的真实画像，显示了特定人群对眩晕、头晕或不稳的治疗需求。它提示我们，在不同国家和市场，前庭康复服务的需求可能存在人口学和临床特征上的差异，但具体如何操作还需进一步研究。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者画像：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在西班牙进行的、通过在线问卷（2025 年 2 月至 6 月）的多中心横断面研究，描绘了因眩晕、头晕或不稳定前往私人前庭物理治疗诊所就诊患者的人口统计学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study offers a real-world snapshot of patients in private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain, highlighting the demand for vertigo, dizziness, or unsteadiness treatment in this population. It suggests that the demographic and clinical profiles of those seeking vestibular rehab may differ across countries and markets, though further investigation is needed to guide specific actions.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计且仅限于西班牙的私人诊所，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study has a cross-sectional design and is limited to private clinics in Spain, which limits the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, kinesthesia) and objective balance/gait measures in hemiparetic individuals, highlighting their contributions to gait abnormalities, postural instability, and fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强化了下肢本体感觉障碍对偏瘫患者步态异常、姿势不稳和跌倒风险的显著影响。这意味着我们在评估偏瘫患者时，应更重视足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉，并将其纳入个体化的步态和平衡训练中。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉、运动觉）与客观平衡/步态测量之间的关联，强调了它们对步态异常、姿势不稳定和跌倒风险的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reinforces the significant impact of lower extremity proprioceptive impairments on gait abnormalities, postural instability, and fall risk in hemiparetic individuals. This means we should prioritize foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia in our assessments of hemiparetic patients, and integrate these findings into individualized gait and balance training.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法确立本体感觉障碍与平衡/步态参数之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design and cannot establish causality between proprioceptive impairments and balance/gait parameters.
items.journal: Gait & posture

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 750 adults with stroke identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories during the first 180 days post-stroke using Growth Mixture Modeling based on Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility scores.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对 750 名卒中患者的回顾性队列研究提示，卒中后 180 天内存在不同的活动能力恢复轨迹。你可以利用此发现更准确地评估卒中患者的预后，并制定个体化的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 使用常规临床数据识别卒中后活动能力恢复的不同模式
items.summaryZh: 一项对750名卒中成人患者进行的回顾性队列研究，利用生长混合模型，基于急性后期活动测量（AM-PAC）基本活动能力评分，识别出卒中后180天内不同的活动能力恢复轨迹。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study of 750 stroke patients suggests distinct mobility recovery trajectories exist within the first 180 days post-stroke. You can use this finding to more accurately assess prognosis and develop individualized rehabilitation strategies for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集偏倚和混杂因素，且模型识别的轨迹是否能推广至更广泛人群尚需验证。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, there may be data collection bias and confounding factors, and whether the identified trajectories can be generalized to a broader population still needs validation.

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis will evaluate the effectiveness of combined biopsychosocial interventions compared to usual care, waiting-list controls, and active unimodal interventions in adults with chronic low back pain, aiming to reduce pain and functional disability.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会干预已被确证在慢性腰痛管理中优于常规护理和单一干预。下次遇到这类患者，你可以更肯定地推荐多模式综合疗法。
items.titleZh: 综合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的有效性：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析将评估综合生物心理社会干预（包含运动疗法、疼痛教育或心理策略）在减轻慢性腰痛成人患者疼痛和功能障碍方面的有效性，并与常规护理、等待列表对照和单一主动干预进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: Biopsychosocial interventions are confirmed to be superior to usual care and unimodal interventions for chronic low back pain. You can more confidently recommend multimodal integrated therapy to these patients.
items.limitation: 该系统综述和荟萃分析检索截至2025年11月，但未提供具体的RCT样本量和效应量数据。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis searched up to November 2025, but did not provide specific RCT sample sizes or effect size data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis will compare the clinical effects of different non-thrust joint mobilization approaches on objective and subjective outcomes in individuals with shoulder adhesive capsulitis, based on English-language RCTs published since 2000.
items.curatedReason: 针对肩关节粘连性囊炎，非冲击性关节松动术是核心保守治疗手段。这项高分综述能帮你确定不同松动术手法的临床效果差异，优化你的手法选择。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动术技术在肩关节粘连性囊炎中的比较疗效：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述将比较不同非冲击性关节松动术方法对肩关节粘连性囊炎患者客观和主观结局的临床效果，为物理治疗中的手法选择提供证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Non-thrust joint mobilization is a core conservative treatment for shoulder adhesive capsulitis. This review helps you identify the clinical effectiveness differences among various mobilization techniques to optimize your manual therapy choices.
items.limitation: 系统综述和荟萃分析检索截至2025年11月，但未提供具体的RCT样本量和效应量数据。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis searched up to November 2025, but did not provide specific RCT sample sizes or effect size data.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals in Vietnam to identify evidence and practice gaps and barriers to effective care.
items.curatedReason: 这项越南的调查揭示了卒中后肩痛管理中存在的实践差距。虽然是观察性研究，但能让你反思自己的临床实践是否充分采纳了循证策略，以及在资源有限环境下如何优化管理。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛的评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查旨在了解越南物理和作业治疗师对卒中后肩痛的评估与管理实践，并识别潜在的证据与实践差距及有效护理的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey from Vietnam highlights practice gaps in post-stroke shoulder pain management. Although observational, it prompts you to reflect on whether your clinical practice fully adopts evidence-based strategies and how to optimize management in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面调查，本研究无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受到参与者回忆偏倚的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, this study cannot establish causality, and results may be subject to recall bias from participants.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review will synthesize outcome domains and measures included in core outcome sets and standard outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury, also examining the involvement of persons with lived experience.
items.curatedReason: 神经康复中，核心结局指标（COS）和标准化结局测量集至关重要。这篇范围综述有助于你了解当前脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤患者的结局领域和测量方法，指导你的临床评估选择。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人患者结局与结局测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在综合脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人患者核心结局集与标准化结局测量集中包含的结局领域和测量指标，并考察患者生活经验参与情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Core outcome sets (COS) and standardized outcome measure sets are crucial for learning health systems in neurorehabilitation. This review helps you understand current outcome domains and measures for SCI, stroke, and TBI patients, guiding your clinical assessment choices.
items.limitation: 该范围综述检索截至2025年5月，但未提供具体纳入研究的数量和详细发现。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review searched up to May 2025, but did not provide the specific number of included studies or detailed findings.
items.journal: Journal of rehabilitation medicine

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: This narrative review examined current applications of the International Classification of Functioning, Disability and and Health (ICF) in post-stroke rehabilitation, benchmarking ICF-based assessments and interventions against the United Kingdom Stroke Guideline. Out of 166 studies, 546 assessments were mapped to the ICF, overlapping with over 80% of UK Guideline topics, primarily focusing on Body Function.
items.curatedReason: ICF 框架在卒中康复中应用广泛，但其临床实施细节仍需推敲。这篇叙述性综述能帮你理解 ICF 在评估和干预中的作用，通过与英国卒中指南对标，优化你的实践。
items.titleZh: ICF 框架评估和干预在卒中后康复中的应用：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 这项叙述性综述审查了ICF（国际功能、残疾和健康分类）在卒中后康复中的当前应用，并与英国卒中指南进行对标。共166项研究中546项评估被映射到ICF，与英国指南80%以上的主题重叠，主要集中在身体功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ICF framework is widely used in stroke rehabilitation, but its specific clinical implementation details warrant your attention. This narrative review helps you understand ICF's role in assessment and intervention, benchmarked against UK stroke guidelines, to optimize your practice.
items.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，本研究可能存在选择偏倚，且未对证据质量进行系统评估。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, this study may have selection bias and did not systematically evaluate the quality of evidence.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study aims to compare triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) and healthy controls, also examining bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的EMG活动度可能低于健康对照组。了解这些神经肌肉差异，能让你在ACL康复中更关注小腿三头肌的训练，优化重返运动策略。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在比较前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的肌电（EMG）活动，并检查ACL重建组内部是否存在双侧神经肌肉差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: EMG activity of the triceps surae during single-leg jumping tasks may be lower in ACLR patients compared to healthy controls. Understanding these neuromuscular differences allows you to focus more on triceps surae training in ACL rehabilitation to optimize return-to-sport strategies.
items.limitation: 研究假设ACL重建组的EMG活动度会更低，但摘要未提供具体的结果数据来支持或反驳这一假设。
items.limitationEn: The study hypothesized lower EMG activity in the ACLR group, but the abstract did not provide specific result data to support or refute this hypothesis.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey distributed to physical therapists via social media aims to describe the influence of patient clinical presentation on the use of blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 血流限制训练（BFRT）在儿童和青少年ACL损伤康复中的应用日益增多。这项调查能让你了解其他物理治疗师在临床决策中如何使用BFRT，评估自己的实践与行业趋势的符合度。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项通过社交媒体向物理治疗师分发的横断面调查旨在描述患者临床表现对前交叉韧带重建术后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练（BFRT）使用的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood flow restriction training (BFRT) is increasingly used in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury rehabilitation. This survey helps you understand how other physical therapists use BFRT in clinical decision-making, allowing you to assess your practice against industry trends.
items.limitation: 作为横断面调查，本研究无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受到社交媒体招募偏倚的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, this study cannot establish causality, and results may be subject to social media recruitment bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial with 28 participants found that dynamic taping and sports taping had immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability, with outcomes measured by joint position sense error and balance tests.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性踝关节不稳的娱乐性运动员，动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）在改善动态平衡和本体感觉方面存在即时效果差异。这项RCT可以指导你选择更适合的贴扎技术来辅助这类患者的康复。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳娱乐性运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项对28名参与者进行的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎和运动贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳的娱乐性运动员的动态平衡和本体感觉有即时效果，通过关节位置感知错误和平衡测试测量。
items.curatedReasonEn: For recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability, dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) show immediate differences in improving dynamic balance and proprioception. This RCT can guide your choice of taping technique to assist rehabilitation for these patients.
items.limitation: 该RCT样本量较小（28名参与者），且仅评估了即时效果，未能提供长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: This RCT has a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed immediate effects, without providing long-term follow-up data.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Real-World Outcomes of a Telephone-Based Virtual Cognitive Rehabilitation Therapy Program: A Retrospective Cohort Analysis
items.summary: A retrospective observational analysis of 141 older adults (mean age 71.2 years, 61.7% MCI, 29.1% dementia) who completed a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program showed improvements in communication, memory, and executive function, with 95% of patients completing treatment to discharge.
items.curatedReason: 远程认知康复（CR）在轻度认知障碍（MCI）和早期痴呆患者中显示出与传统面对面康复相似的疗效，尤其对老年农村患者具有重要意义。你可以考虑将电话结合自动化语音代理的虚拟CR模型纳入服务选项，提升可及性。
items.titleZh: 电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目的真实世界结果：一项回顾性队列分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对141名完成电话虚拟认知康复项目的成年患者（平均年龄71.2岁，61.7%MCI，29.1%痴呆）的回顾性观察分析显示，患者在沟通、记忆和执行功能方面有所改善，95%的患者完成治疗并出院。
items.curatedReasonEn: Telephonic cognitive rehabilitation (CR) shows similar efficacy to traditional in-person rehab for MCI and early dementia, especially for older rural patients. Consider integrating a virtual CR model combining SLP-led sessions with automated voice agents to enhance accessibility in your practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性观察研究，存在选择偏倚，且缺乏随机对照组来确证远程与面对面干预的非劣效性。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective observational study with selection bias and lacks a randomized control group to confirm the non-inferiority of telerehabilitation to in-person intervention.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: This brief report explores Portuguese stroke survivors' return-to-work experiences, focusing on perceived consequences, barriers, and enablers, based on a questionnaire completed by 1,175 stroke survivors 18-24 months post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 葡萄牙 1,175 名卒中幸存者的调查提示，身体、认知障碍和职场适应性不足是重返工作的主要挑战。这份报告能让你在康复计划中更实际地整合职业康复目标，应对患者重返社会面临的障碍。
items.titleZh: 卒中后职业再融入：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 这份简要报告基于1175名葡萄牙卒中幸存者在卒中后18-24个月完成的问卷，探讨了他们重返工作的经验，重点关注感知到的后果、障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: A survey of 1,175 Portuguese stroke survivors suggests physical and cognitive impairments, along with insufficient workplace adaptations, are key challenges to returning to work. This report helps you integrate vocational rehabilitation goals more realistically into your plans, addressing the barriers patients face in returning to society.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性调查，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受限于葡萄牙的社会经济和医疗系统背景。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational survey, which cannot establish causality, and the results may be limited by the socioeconomic and healthcare system context in Portugal.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Development and Preliminary Clinical Feasibility of a Wearable Nanovibration Delivery Device for Localised Bone Stimulation in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: A wearable nanovibration delivery device, designed to deliver 1 kHz nanoscale stimulation to the distal femur, showed preliminary clinical feasibility in healthy volunteers for potential localized bone stimulation in individuals with spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项可穿戴纳振动递送装置的初步临床可行性研究，为脊髓损伤（SCI）患者局部骨骼刺激提供了潜在新途径。虽然还处于早期阶段，但这种非侵入性技术未来可能成为预防SCI患者骨质流失的新选择，值得你保持关注。
items.titleZh: 用于脊髓损伤患者局部骨骼刺激的可穿戴纳振动递送装置的开发及初步临床可行性
items.summaryZh: 一项可穿戴纳振动递送装置的开发及其初步临床可行性研究显示，该装置旨在为脊髓损伤患者的股骨远端提供1 kHz纳尺度刺激，并在健康志愿者中验证了其在局部骨骼刺激方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary clinical feasibility study of a wearable nanovibration delivery device offers a potential new avenue for localized bone stimulation in spinal cord injury (SCI) patients. While early-stage, this non-invasive technique could become a future option for preventing bone loss in SCI patients, warranting your continued attention.
items.limitation: 目前仅进行了设备开发和初步健康志愿者评估，尚未在SCI患者中进行大规模疗效验证。
items.limitationEn: Currently, only device development and preliminary healthy volunteer evaluations have been conducted; large-scale efficacy validation in SCI patients is pending.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: A case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain (elbow, shoulder, wrist) who had concurrent spine dysfunction and showed clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after spine mobilization or manipulation techniques.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例系列提示，上肢疼痛患者即使表现不典型，脊柱功能障碍仍可能是原发症状源。评估上肢疼痛时，别忘了检查脊柱。
items.titleZh: 上肢疼痛患者的脊柱检查与治疗：一个病例系列
items.summaryZh: 该病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者（肘、肩、腕），他们同时存在脊柱功能障碍，经脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告残疾程度得到临床显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests that even with atypical presentations, spinal dysfunction can be the primary source of symptoms in patients with upper extremity pain. Remember to assess the spine when evaluating upper extremity pain.
items.limitation: 作为病例系列研究，本研究样本量小（3例），缺乏对照组，无法推断普遍适用性和因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a case series, this study has a small sample size (3 cases) and lacks a control group, making it impossible to generalize findings or infer causality.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study, using semi-structured interviews with 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 partners in care, explored their experiences performing mouthcare activities at home, identifying motor and non-motor barriers like reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy.
items.curatedReason: 针对 13 名帕金森病患者及其 7 名照护者的访谈显示，运动和非运动障碍是口腔护理的主要难题。你应将减退的灵活性、疲劳和冷漠等因素纳入康复考量，以便提供更切实的日常护理支持。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终只会制造更多问题”：一项探索帕金森病患者及其照护者居家口腔护理经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究通过对13名帕金森病患者和7名照护者进行半结构化访谈，探讨了他们在居家口腔护理活动中的经验，识别出运动和非运动障碍，如灵活性下降、疲劳和冷漠。
items.curatedReasonEn: Interviews with 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 caregivers reveal motor and non-motor impairments are key challenges in mouthcare. You should consider factors like reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy when planning rehabilitation, to provide more practical daily care support.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，本研究样本量较小（20名参与者），结果的普适性有限，且解释可能存在研究者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, this research has a small sample size (20 participants), limited generalizability, and interpretations may be subject to researcher bias.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.curatedReason: 这篇新闻报道表明，对于不稳定性踝关节骨折术后患者，早期负重可能加速康复。尽管是新闻报道，但这一方向与康复医学的趋势一致，未来可关注更严谨的证据。
items.titleZh: 早期负重可加速不稳定踝关节骨折术后恢复
items.summaryZh: 一项研究表明，对于不稳定性踝关节骨折术后患者，早期负重可以加快康复速度，从而改善患者预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: This news report suggests that early weight-bearing may accelerate recovery after unstable ankle fracture surgery. While a news piece, this aligns with rehabilitation trends; keep an eye out for more rigorous evidence.

items.title: The association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed a significant association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain, highlighting the comorbid prevalence and longitudinal relationship between these two conditions in adult populations.
items.curatedReason: 糖尿病与腰痛之间存在明确关联。在评估和管理糖尿病患者的腰痛时，你应意识到这种共病关系，并考虑更综合的治疗策略，而非孤立处理。不要忽视对糖尿病患者的腰痛进行全面评估。
items.titleZh: 糖尿病与腰痛的关联：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，糖尿病与腰痛之间存在显著关联，强调了这两种疾病在成年人群中的共病患病率和纵向关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: A clear association exists between diabetes and low back pain. When assessing and managing LBP in diabetic patients, you should be aware of this comorbidity and consider more integrated treatment strategies rather than isolated approaches. Do not overlook comprehensive LBP assessment in diabetic patients.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但纳入研究的异质性（如 LBP 诊断标准、糖尿病类型、随访时间）可能影响汇总结果的准确性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review, heterogeneity among included studies (e.g., LBP diagnostic criteria, diabetes types, follow-up duration) might affect the accuracy of pooled results.

items.title: Effects of a 4-week neuromuscular balance training program on knee proprioception, functional performance, and landing errors in national-level female wrestlers: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A 4-week neuromuscular balance training program significantly improved knee proprioception, functional performance, and reduced landing errors in 22 national-level female wrestlers, suggesting a potential for lower extremity injury risk reduction.
items.curatedReason: 对于女子摔跤运动员，短期的神经肌肉平衡训练能有效提升膝关节本体感觉、功能表现并减少着陆错误。可在赛季前或训练周期中整合此类干预，以降低下肢损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 为期 4 周的神经肌肉平衡训练对国家级女子摔跤运动员膝关节本体感觉、功能表现和着陆错误的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 4 周的神经肌肉平衡训练计划显著改善了 22 名国家级女子摔跤运动员的膝关节本体感觉、功能表现并减少了着陆错误，提示可能降低下肢损伤风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: For female wrestlers, short-term neuromuscular balance training effectively improves knee proprioception, functional performance, and reduces landing errors. Consider integrating such interventions pre-season or during training cycles to mitigate lower extremity injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（22名），可能限制结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study's small sample size (22 participants) may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Acute effects of aerobic versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers exposed to high ergonomic risk with chronic non-specific neck pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This RCT found that combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise had superior acute effects on pressure pain threshold (PPT), pain perception, and fatigue compared to aerobic exercise alone in workers with chronic non-specific neck pain.
items.curatedReason: 对慢性非特异性颈痛且面临高人体工程学风险的工人，结合有氧和颈部/上肢阻力训练能更有效地即刻缓解疼痛和疲劳，并在 PPT 改善上优于单纯有氧运动。考虑将其作为急性疼痛管理策略。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对高人体工程学风险慢性非特异性颈痛工人压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳的急性影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验发现，在高人体工程学风险的慢性非特异性颈痛工人中，结合有氧和颈部-上肢阻力运动在改善压力痛阈（PPT）、疼痛感知和疲劳方面的急性效应优于单纯有氧运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: For workers with chronic non-specific neck pain at high ergonomic risk, combined aerobic and cervical/upper extremity resistance exercise acutely reduces pain and fatigue more effectively, and improves PPT better than aerobic exercise alone. Consider this for acute pain management strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究只评估了运动的即刻急性效应，长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This study only evaluated the immediate acute effects of exercise, and long-term effects remain unclear.

items.curatedReason: Aspetar运动医学医院的腘绳肌损伤康复路径提供了一个经过实践验证的框架，你可以借鉴其理念，特别是在重返运动（RTS）阶段的指导原则，结合自身经验，优化你的腘绳肌损伤康复流程。
items.titleZh: Aspetar 腘绳肌损伤康复路径
items.summaryZh: Aspetar 运动医学医院发布了其腘绳肌损伤康复路径，为临床实践提供了基于该机构经验的标准化康复流程和重返运动标准。
items.curatedReasonEn: Aspetar Sports Medicine Hospital's hamstring injury rehabilitation pathway offers a practice-proven framework. You can draw upon its principles, especially the guidelines for return to sport (RTS), and integrate them with your own experience to optimize your hamstring injury rehabilitation process.
items.limitation: 该康复路径可能基于特定机构的资源和患者群体，外推到其他环境时需谨慎评估。
items.limitationEn: This rehabilitation pathway may be based on specific institutional resources and patient populations, requiring careful evaluation when extrapolated to other settings.

items.title: Comparative biomechanical strength of autografts for ligament reconstruction: quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations (quadruple and braided) and iliotibial band: an exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study
items.summary: An exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study compared the strength of various autografts (quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring, iliotibial band) for knee ligament reconstruction, providing data on their comparative biomechanical properties.
items.curatedReason: 这项尸体生物力学研究比较了不同自体移植物用于韧带重建的强度。这些数据对你理解各种移植物的力学特性至关重要，能为你在术后康复负重、选择性保护方面提供更精确的依据。
items.titleZh: 不同自体移植物在韧带重建中的生物力学强度比较：股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、腘绳肌（四股和编织）和髂胫束：一项探索性尸体生物力学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性尸体生物力学研究比较了不同自体移植物（股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、腘绳肌、髂胫束）在膝关节韧带重建中的生物力学强度，提供了其比较生物力学特性数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cadaveric biomechanical study compares the strength of various autografts for ligament reconstruction. This data is crucial for you to understand the mechanical properties of different grafts, providing a more precise basis for postoperative rehabilitation loading and selective protection.
items.limitation: 这是一项尸体研究，其生物力学特性可能无法完全代表活体组织，且未涉及临床预后。
items.limitationEn: This is a cadaveric study, and its biomechanical properties may not fully represent living tissue, nor does it address clinical outcomes.

items.title: Beyond acute concussion assessment to office management: a systematic review informing the development of a Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6) for adults and children
items.summary: A systematic review informed the development of a Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6) for adults and children, aiming to guide acute concussion assessment to office management.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述为制定运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具（SCOAT6）提供了依据。你可以参考其内容，更新你对成人和儿童脑震荡的评估和办公室管理策略，确保实践与最新证据保持一致。
items.titleZh: 超越急性脑震荡评估到办公室管理：一项为成人和儿童运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具 (SCOAT6) 开发提供信息的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述为成人和儿童运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具（SCOAT6）的开发提供了信息，旨在指导急性脑震荡评估至办公室管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review provides the basis for developing the Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6). You can refer to its content to update your assessment and office management strategies for adult and pediatric concussions, ensuring your practice aligns with the latest evidence.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述，其质量受限于纳入研究的异质性和偏倚风险。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, its quality is limited by the heterogeneity and risk of bias in the included studies.

items.title: The correlation between spatiotemporal gait and pain in patients with musculoskeletal pain using smartphone-based gait technology: a retrospective cross sectional study
items.summary: A retrospective cross-sectional study of 3,595 patients found significant correlations between smartphone-based spatiotemporal gait parameters and pain severity in patients with knee and back musculoskeletal pain, with varying gait compensation strategies based on pain location.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机步态技术为评估肌骨疼痛患者的步态参数与疼痛相关性提供了便捷工具。可将这类客观数据纳入你的临床评估，以更好地理解膝关节和腰背疼痛患者的步态代偿策略。
items.titleZh: 使用智能手机步态技术评估肌骨疼痛患者时空步态与疼痛的相关性：一项回顾性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 3,595 名患者进行的回顾性横断面研究发现，使用智能手机步态技术评估的患者，其时空步态参数与膝关节和腰背肌骨疼痛的严重程度之间存在显著相关性，且步态代偿策略因疼痛部位而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone-based gait technology offers a convenient tool to assess spatiotemporal gait parameters and their correlation with pain in musculoskeletal pain patients. Integrate such objective data into your clinical assessments to better understand gait compensation strategies in knee and back pain patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据主要来自美国诊所，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective study, limiting causal inference, and data primarily from US clinics may limit generalizability.

items.title: The efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive ...
items.summary: A three-level meta-analysis found virtual reality interventions to be effective for depressive disorder secondary to other medical conditions, suggesting its potential as an adjunctive therapy.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者可能有效。作为康复治疗师，你可以开始探索 VR 技术作为辅助干预手段的可行性，尤其是在神经或长期病患管理中。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实干预对其他医学疾病引起的抑郁症的疗效：一项三级荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项三级荟萃分析发现，虚拟现实干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症有效，表明其作为辅助疗法的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality interventions may be effective for patients with depressive disorder due to another medical condition. As a rehabilitation therapist, you can start exploring the feasibility of VR technology as an adjunctive intervention, particularly in neurological or chronic disease management.
items.limitation: 三级荟萃分析可能包含异质性较高的研究，结果需结合具体疾病背景解读。
items.limitationEn: A three-level meta-analysis may include studies with high heterogeneity, and results should be interpreted in the context of specific medical conditions.

items.title: Evaluation of stroke-associated risk alleles in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort
items.summary: A study in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort evaluated 29 previously reported stroke-associated single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs), finding that some European-derived risk alleles are also relevant in Southeast Asian populations.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性遗传学研究提示，在东南亚多民族人群中，部分欧洲人群的卒中风险基因型也具有相关性。这提醒你，卒中风险具有复杂的遗传背景，尽管目前尚不能直接指导康复，但有助于你更全面地理解患者风险因素，并期待未来精准医疗对康复策略的影响。
items.titleZh: 多民族新加坡缺血性卒中队列中卒中相关风险等位基因的评估
items.summaryZh: 一项针对新加坡多民族缺血性卒中队列的研究评估了 29 个先前报道的卒中相关单核苷酸多态性（SNP），发现一些源自欧洲的风险等位基因在东南亚人群中也具有相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort evaluated stroke-associated risk alleles. Although genetic, it helps you understand the complexity of stroke risk and suggests that stroke prevention and rehabilitation strategies might need to consider genetic differences in diverse cultural contexts.
items.limitation: 该研究主要关注遗传风险因素，未涉及康复干预，因此对临床实践的直接指导有限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focuses on genetic risk factors and does not involve rehabilitation interventions, thus offering limited direct guidance for clinical practice.

items.title: Weighted total genotype score associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes
items.summary: A retrospective analysis of 534 Japanese basketball athletes found that weighted total genotype scores were associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes, suggesting a role for genetic factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，综合基因型评分与青少年女子篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率相关。虽然基因检测尚未普及，但了解遗传风险能让你在运动损伤预防中更具前瞻性，针对高危个体制定个性化策略。
items.titleZh: 加权总基因型评分与青少年女子篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤发生率的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项对 534 名日本篮球运动员的回顾性分析发现，加权总基因型评分与青少年女子篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率相关，提示了遗传因素的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that weighted total genotype scores are associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes. While genetic testing isn't widespread, understanding genetic risks allows for a more proactive approach in sports injury prevention, enabling personalized strategies for high-risk individuals.
items.limitation: 研究样本为日本青少年，结果的普适性可能受地理和民族限制。
items.limitationEn: The study sample consists of Japanese adolescents, and the generalizability of the findings may be limited by geography and ethnicity.

items.title: Clinical and biomechanical outcomes of rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control in athletic groin pain: prospective cohort of 205 patients
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 205 patients with athletic groin pain demonstrated positive clinical and biomechanical outcomes from rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对205名患者的前瞻性队列研究证实了针对节段间控制的康复训练对运动性腹股沟疼痛的临床和生物力学益处。这为你的运动性腹股沟疼痛患者提供了明确的治疗方向，你可以积极将节段间控制训练纳入康复方案，以改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 针对节段间控制的康复训练在运动性腹股沟疼痛中的临床和生物力学效果：205 名患者的前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 205 名运动性腹股沟疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究表明，针对节段间控制的康复训练取得了积极的临床和生物力学成果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study of 205 patients confirms the clinical and biomechanical benefits of rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control for athletic groin pain. This provides a clear treatment direction for your patients with athletic groin pain, and you can actively incorporate intersegmental control training into rehabilitation programs to improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究设计为前瞻性队列研究，缺乏随机对照，结果可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a prospective cohort study, lacking randomized controls, and results may be subject to confounding factors.

items.title: 80 Motor stimulation program in early childhood centers: ‘Proemoji’
items.summary:
80 Motor stimulation program in early childhood centers: ‘Proemoji’ | BMJ Paediatrics Open
...
# 80 Motor stimulation program in early childhood centers: ‘Proemoji’
items.curatedReason: 这项关于早期儿童中心运动刺激项目“Proemoji”的报告，提示了在学前阶段促进儿童运动发育的潜力。你可以借鉴这些社区介入的理念，考虑如何在你的实践中融入更多游戏化、集体化的运动干预。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童中心运动刺激项目：“Proemoji”
items.summaryZh: 一项在早期儿童中心实施的运动刺激项目“Proemoji”的报告，展示了其在促进儿童运动发展方面的初步成果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report on the early childhood motor stimulation program “Proemoji” highlights the potential for promoting motor development in preschoolers. You can draw on these community intervention concepts and consider how to incorporate more gamified, group-based motor interventions into your practice.
items.limitation: 这是一份会议摘要，信息量有限，缺乏详细的研究方法和结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a conference abstract with limited information, lacking detailed research methods and results.

items.title: Handgrip strength in children, adolescents, and young adults with suspected myalgic encephalomyelitis/chronic fatigue syndrome
items.summary: A study on children, adolescents, and young adults with suspected myalgic encephalomyelitis/chronic fatigue syndrome (ME/CFS) found handgrip strength assessment to be feasible and clinically valuable for evaluating post-exertional malaise (PEM).
items.curatedReason: 这项关于肌痛性脑脊髓炎/慢性疲劳综合征（ME/CFS）患儿握力研究，指出了握力评估在识别运动后不适（PEM）和评估病情中的潜力。在评估 ME/CFS 患儿时，你可以将握力测试作为客观指标之一，辅助诊断和监测。
items.titleZh: 疑似肌痛性脑脊髓炎/慢性疲劳综合征儿童、青少年和年轻成人中的握力

items.title: Sleep-related Alzheimer's disease vulnerability in aging: A muscle-metabolic perspective

items.curatedReasonEn: This review proposes a "sleep-muscle-brain" framework, identifying sarcopenia, sarcopenic obesity, and insulin resistance as modifiable conditions influencing sleep continuity and Alzheimer's disease vulnerability. items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.

items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. items.titleZh: 血管性下肢大截肢后营养不良与更高的再截肢率或生存率、更低的活动能力和生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究

items.curatedReasonEn: Undernutrition in amputee patients is not merely a comorbidity; it is associated with poorer mobility, lower survival rates, and a higher risk of reamputation. Ensure you screen for and manage nutritional status during rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，可能存在混杂因素。

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.

items.curatedReason: 对卒中后认知障碍患者，除了传统物理康复，别忘了评估和转诊认知康复。这项回顾性研究提示，结合认知康复可能显著降低患者发展为卒中后痴呆的风险。

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center RCT (n=54) found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding for 14 days improved gastric motility and swallowing recovery, and reduced reflux risk compared to continuous nasogastric tube feeding in patients with post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，间歇性口咽管喂养相对于鼻胃管喂养可能提供更好的胃动力和吞咽恢复效果。如果你目前常规使用鼻胃管，这项研究提示你可以开始考虑间歇性口咽管作为替代方案，尤其是在降低反流风险方面。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难患者间歇性口咽管喂养与鼻胃管喂养的多模式评估、反流风险及临床疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心随机对照试验（n=54）显示，对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，为期14天的间歇性口咽管喂养在改善胃动力、促进吞咽恢复和降低反流风险方面优于持续鼻胃管喂养。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with post-stroke dysphagia, intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding may offer better gastric motility and swallowing recovery compared to nasogastric tube feeding. If you routinely use nasogastric tubes, this study suggests you might consider intermittent oro-esophageal tubes as an alternative, particularly for reducing reflux risk.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心研究，样本量较小（54例），结果外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study with a small sample size (54 patients), so results should be generalized with caution.

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review of randomized controlled trials investigated the effectiveness of various physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis (EDSS score ≤6.0), concluding that while exercise may be beneficial, specific effects remain unclear due to diverse interventions and outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述肯定了物理运动在多发性硬化症（MS）痉挛管理中的重要性，但指出了缺乏统一的运动方案和对长期效果的关注。这提示你应将运动作为MS痉挛的非药物干预选项，但具体方案需结合患者情况进行个体化设计。
items.titleZh: 物理运动对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述调查了不同物理运动干预对多发性硬化症（EDSS评分≤6.0）患者痉挛的有效性，提示运动可能有效，但具体效果因干预措施多样性而不明确。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review affirms the importance of physical exercise in managing spasticity in multiple sclerosis (MS) but highlights the lack of standardized exercise protocols and focus on long-term effects. This suggests you should consider exercise as a non-pharmacological intervention for MS spasticity, but specific programs require individualized design based on patient conditions.
items.limitation: 本系统综述的纳入研究在运动干预类型和结果评估方法上存在异质性，导致无法进行荟萃分析，仅能进行叙述性总结。
items.limitationEn: The included studies in this systematic review showed heterogeneity in exercise intervention types and outcome assessment methods, precluding meta-analysis and allowing only narrative synthesis.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists explored their knowledge, attitudes, and practices concerning motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, revealing widely spread interests but no specific findings on knowledge or practice gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这项小样本观察性研究初步勾勒了南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习知识、态度和实践的现状。结果提示了知识和实践的潜在差距。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项针对40名南非物理治疗师的调查探讨了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践，揭示了其兴趣的广泛分布。
items.curatedReasonEn: This small observational study provides an initial snapshot of South African physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. The findings suggest potential gaps between knowledge and practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本横断面调查，仅包含40名物理治疗师，且采用便利和滚雪球抽样，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This small cross-sectional survey included only 40 physiotherapists using convenience and snowball sampling, limiting the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality (VR)-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40, 95% CI: 0.14-0.65, P = 0.002), physical function (SMD = 0.37, 95% CI: 0.05-0.70, P = 0.003), and balance (SMD = 0.44, 95% CI: 0.16-0.72, P = 0.002) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 对于膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者，VR 辅助物理治疗在缓解疼痛、改善身体功能和平衡方面显示出优于传统康复治疗的显著优势。它提供了可行的临床替代方案，值得你在实践中考虑引入。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疗效：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 5 项随机对照试验（RCT）的系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，虚拟现实（VR）辅助物理治疗在改善膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛 (SMD = 0.40, P = 0.002)、身体功能 (SMD = 0.37, P = 0.003) 和平衡 (SMD = 0.44, P = 0.002) 方面，均优于传统康复治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with knee osteoarthritis (KOA), VR-assisted physiotherapy demonstrates significant advantages over traditional rehabilitation in pain relief, physical function, and balance. It offers a viable clinical alternative worth considering in your practice.
items.limitation: 本综述仅纳入 5 项 RCT，样本量可能限制了结果的普遍性，且未报告异质性数据。
items.limitationEn: This review included only 5 RCTs, which may limit the generalizability of results, and did not report heterogeneity data.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional study among sub-acute adult stroke survivors (within 6 weeks post-stroke) in the UK demonstrated that the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties, with early-phase diagnostic accuracy assessed using ROC analysis and random forest analysis.
items.curatedReason: 牛津视知觉筛查（OxVPS）在亚急性成人卒中患者中能有效检测视知觉障碍。当你早期筛查卒中患者时，可以考虑引入 OxVPS 作为辅助工具，帮助及时识别并干预这些容易被忽视的问题。
items.titleZh: 牛津视知觉筛查量表可在亚急性成人卒中幸存者中检测视知觉障碍：一项早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国进行的亚急性成人卒中幸存者（卒中后 6 周内）前瞻性横断面研究表明，牛津视知觉筛查量表（OxVPS）能有效检测视知觉障碍，并通过受试者工作特征曲线（ROC）分析和随机森林分析评估了早期诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors. When screening stroke patients early, consider incorporating OxVPS as an auxiliary tool to help identify and intervene in these often-overlooked issues promptly.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且是在英国特定康复单位进行，结果外推性需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size and specific UK rehabilitation unit setting limit generalizability, requiring further validation.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model did not significantly affect the proportion of hospitals delivering lower extremity joint replacement prehabilitation in CJR treatment areas compared to control areas.
items.curatedReason: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付的影响，直接关系到你在美国 Medicare 患者群体中的执业模式。如果 CJR 模式确实减少了术前康复，你需要评估如何应对这种支付政策变化，以确保患者能获得必要的术前准备。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 62,217 名 Medicare 受益者的双重差分分析发现，综合关节置换护理（CJR）强制性捆绑支付模式并未显著影响 CJR 治疗区域医院提供下肢关节置换术前康复的比例，与对照区域相比。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of mandatory bundled payments on prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement directly affects your practice model for Medicare patients in the US. If the CJR model truly reduces prehabilitation, you need to assess how to respond to this payment policy change to ensure patients receive necessary preoperative preparation.
items.limitation: 研究仅关注 Medicare 受益者和美国特定支付模式，结果不适用于其他国家或支付体系。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses solely on Medicare beneficiaries and a specific US payment model, so results are not applicable to other countries or payment systems.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 140 TIA and mild stroke participants found that a once-weekly 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6-minute walk test distance), physical activity, and quality of life over 6 months compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，集成心血管康复项目对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的功能运动能力、身体活动和生活质量具有长期益处。在处理 TIA 或轻度卒中患者时，你应该积极推荐并整合这类康复服务，以改善他们的长期预后。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项对 140 名短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者进行的随机对照试验发现，每周一次、为期 6 周的心血管康复项目，与常规护理相比，在 6 个月内显著改善了功能运动能力（6 分钟步行试验距离）、身体活动和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial shows that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation programs offer long-term benefits for functional exercise capacity, physical activity, and quality of life in patients with transient ischemic attack (TIA) and mild stroke. When managing TIA or mild stroke patients, you should actively recommend and integrate such rehabilitation services to improve their long-term prognosis.
items.limitation: 研究在大学健康中心进行，结果可能不完全适用于所有临床环境；患者为 TIA 或轻度卒中，重症患者的适用性未评估。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted at a university health center, and results may not be fully applicable to all clinical settings; applicability to severe stroke patients was not assessed as participants had TIA or mild stroke.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study investigated whether combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data enhances machine-learning classification between individuals with knee osteoarthritis (KOA) and healthy controls compared with single-domain models.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，多模态整合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据能有效提升机器学习模型对膝骨关节炎（KOA）的分类诊断能力。在临床实践中，你可以考虑结合多种评估手段，利用数据整合来提高 KOA 的早期诊断和鉴别诊断准确性。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合提升膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类能力：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究旨在调查，与单一领域模型相比，步态、平衡和红外热成像数据的多模态整合是否能提高机器学习模型对膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者与健康对照组的分类辨别能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that multimodal integration of gait, balance, and infrared thermography data can effectively improve machine learning models' classification accuracy for knee osteoarthritis (KOA). In clinical practice, you might consider combining multiple assessment methods and leveraging data integration to enhance early and differential diagnosis accuracy for KOA.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，不能提供 KOA 进展的纵向信息；机器学习模型的泛化能力需在更大样本和多中心数据中验证。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to provide longitudinal information on KOA progression; the generalizability of machine learning models needs validation with larger samples and multi-center data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) applied to the radial nerve, combined with exercise, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain, improving pain intensity, disability, and psychological outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性外侧肘痛（网球肘），经皮电神经刺激（PENS）结合运动在中长期随访中显示出显著疗效。当你遇到药物和传统方法效果不佳的患者时，可以考虑将 PENS 作为辅助干预手段，但需注意其定位精度和患者选择。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗慢性外侧肘痛的中长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 49 名患者的随机、双盲、假对照试验发现，超声引导的经皮电神经刺激（PENS）应用于桡神经并结合运动，对慢性外侧肘痛（网球肘）在中长期随访中具有益处，改善了疼痛强度、残疾和心理结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic lateral elbow pain (tennis elbow), percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) combined with exercise shows significant efficacy in mid- to long-term follow-up. When encountering patients with inadequate response to medication and traditional methods, consider PENS as an adjunctive intervention, paying attention to its precise targeting and patient selection.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（49 例），可能影响结果的外推性；长期随访数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The study's small sample size (49 cases) may limit generalizability, and long-term follow-up data are limited.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: This secondary analysis of an RCT investigated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, evaluating adherence to pain thresholds and physiotherapy sessions among 84 patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动依从性的研究，提醒我们关注疼痛阈值与治疗依从性的复杂关系。在设计康复方案时，不仅要考虑运动本身，还应优化疼痛管理策略以提高患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者的随机对照试验（RCT）次级数据分析，调查了在 26 周运动干预中两种疼痛阈值方案的依从性，评估了 84 名患者对疼痛阈值和物理治疗会话的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on exercise adherence in patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy highlights the complex relationship between pain thresholds and treatment adherence. When designing rehabilitation programs, you should optimize pain management strategies in addition to the exercises themselves to improve patient compliance.
items.limitation: 本研究为 RCT 的次级数据分析，重点关注依从性而非干预疗效，且依从性数据可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study is a secondary data analysis of an RCT, focusing on adherence rather than intervention efficacy, and adherence data may be subject to bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT in Brazil found that a Pilates exercise program for chronic non-specific low back pain had limited cost-effectiveness compared to home-based exercises from both healthcare and societal perspectives, especially when considering the lack of insurance coverage for Pilates.
items.curatedReason: 这项巴西的研究提示，与家庭运动相比，普拉提对慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益可能有限。在临床实践中，你需要平衡治疗效果与患者的可及性和经济负担，特别是当普拉提不被医保覆盖时。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与家庭运动治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验（RCT）的经济学评估显示，从医疗和社会角度来看，普拉提运动项目治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益，与家庭运动相比可能有限，尤其考虑到普拉提缺乏医保覆盖。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Brazilian study suggests that Pilates may have limited cost-effectiveness for chronic non-specific low back pain compared to home-based exercises. In clinical practice, you need to balance treatment efficacy with patient accessibility and financial burden, especially when Pilates is not covered by insurance.
items.limitation: 该经济学评估仅限于巴西的医疗系统，结果可能不适用于其他国家；患者年龄范围受限（18-50岁）。
items.limitationEn: This economic evaluation is limited to the Brazilian healthcare system, and results may not be applicable to other countries; the patient age range is restricted (18-50 years).
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics (recruitment threshold, firing rate, and action potential amplitude) during a sustained spinal extension task in 33 healthy participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项实验性研究有助于我们理解急性腰痛对运动单位行为的即时影响。它为未来更精准的康复干预提供了生理学基础，但目前尚不直接指导临床决策。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛时腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了在持续脊柱伸展任务中，实验诱导急性腰痛对 33 名健康参与者力量稳定性及运动单位放电特征（募集阈值、放电频率和动作电位幅度）的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This experimental study helps us understand the immediate effects of acute low back pain on motor unit behavior. It provides a physiological basis for future, more precise rehabilitation interventions, but does not directly guide clinical decisions at present.
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康人群的实验性疼痛诱导模型，结果外推到真实临床患者需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study used an experimentally induced pain model in healthy participants, and results should be extrapolated to real clinical patients with caution.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies, including 29 RCTs, to explore the range, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, as well as the outcome measures used for assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 29 项 RCT 的范围综述，证实了生活方式干预对膝骨关节炎的广泛应用前景。它提醒你，在 KOA 患者教育和个体化治疗中，除运动外，饮食、体重管理等同样关键。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎个体化生活方式干预的探索：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述纳入了 36 项研究（含 29 项随机对照试验），旨在探索膝骨关节炎（KOA）生活方式干预的范围、特征和结果，以及所使用的评估指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review, encompassing 29 RCTs, confirms the broad applicability of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. It reinforces that beyond exercise, aspects like diet and weight management are equally crucial in KOA patient education and individualized treatment.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，纳入研究的证据等级可能参差不齐。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess quality, and the evidence levels of included studies may vary.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and cost of physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs), finding a mean age of 47.8 ± 25.7 years and a predominantly female patient population.
items.curatedReason: 这项尼日利亚的回顾性研究揭示了当地物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本。它提供了特定区域的真实世界数据，可作为跨文化实践和医疗政策制定的参考。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项在尼日利亚大学教学医院对 1582 名患者进行的 10 年回顾性研究，评估了物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本，发现平均年龄为 47.8 ± 25.7 岁，患者以女性为主。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study from Nigeria reveals the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and costs of physiotherapy-managed musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs) in the region. It provides real-world data for a specific area, which can serve as a reference for cross-cultural practice and healthcare policy development.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，数据质量和完整性可能受限；结果为单一机构数据，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective study with potential limitations in data quality and completeness; single-institution data with limited generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed evidence-based physical therapy protocols for patients after surgical resection of bone tumors and reconstruction with megaprostheses, through an explorative literature search and a two-stage consensus procedure involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists. Protocols were developed for six different megaprostheses.
items.curatedReason: 这份关于骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗协议提供了基于证据的实践指导。它可以帮助你为这类复杂病例制定更规范、更安全的康复计划，提升治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过探索性文献检索和包含骨肿瘤外科医生及物理治疗师的两阶段共识程序，为骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换的患者制定了基于证据的物理治疗方案，共涉及六种不同巨型假体。
items.curatedReasonEn: These physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection address a significant gap in clinical guidance. The specific instructions for six different types of megaprostheses will help you manage the postoperative rehabilitation of these complex cases more safely and effectively.
items.limitation: 协议是基于探索性文献检索和专家共识程序制定的，缺乏高级别证据的直接验证。
items.limitationEn: The protocols were developed based on an exploratory literature search and expert consensus, lacking direct validation from high-level evidence.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study with interviews explored the expectations and experiences of patients with hip or knee osteoarthritis regarding physical therapist-led (PT-led) orthopedic triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, highlighting perceptions of care quality, participation in decision-making, and fulfillment of assessment expectations.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提示我们，膝髋骨关节炎患者对 PT 主导分诊的期望远不止于临床评估。在瑞典的实践经验表明，确保患者充分参与决策和感受被理解，对提升整体满意度至关重要。
items.titleZh: 安全之手——膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级护理中物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 一项通过访谈进行的探索性定性研究，探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导（PT-led）骨科分诊的期望和体验，强调了对护理质量、决策参与和评估期望满足度的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study suggests that hip and knee osteoarthritis patients' expectations for PT-led triage extend beyond clinical assessment. Experience from Sweden indicates that ensuring patient participation in decision-making and feeling understood are crucial for overall satisfaction.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小，结果不具统计学代表性，可能存在受访者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, lacking statistical representativeness and potentially subject to interviewee bias.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation, mapping study design, stimulation parameters, outcome measures, and reported effects. The review systematically searched five databases from inception to December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述指出了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复领域的潜力与局限。它提供了 tSCS 刺激参数和当前研究进展的概览，但鉴于其探索性质，目前仅适合作为未来 RCT 设计的参考。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激在卒中康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统梳理了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据，包括研究设计、刺激参数、结局指标和报告效果。该综述系统检索了五个数据库，时间范围从开始至 2025 年 12 月。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights both the potential and limitations of transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) in stroke rehabilitation. While it offers an overview of tSCS parameters and current research, its exploratory nature means it should currently only serve as a reference for future RCT design.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重于证据的映射和综合，未对纳入研究的质量进行深入评估。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review focuses on mapping and synthesizing evidence, without in-depth quality assessment of included studies.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review aimed to identify, categorize, and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了康复特异性质量指标，强调了跨专业康复护理评估的重要性。它有助于你从更宏观的视角审视并优化自身服务，确保多学科协作下的治疗质量。
items.titleZh: 旨在加强卫生系统内康复服务的范围综述：康复特异性质量指标
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别、分类和评估具有通用适用性的康复特异性质量指标（QIs），以评估跨专业康复护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes rehabilitation-specific quality indicators, emphasizing the importance of evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care. It helps you take a broader view to assess and optimize your services, ensuring quality in multidisciplinary collaboration.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，主要侧重于指标的识别和分类，可能未能深入探讨指标的实用性和验证情况。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess quality and primarily focus on indicator identification and categorization, potentially not delving deeply into indicator practicality and validation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report of a 75-year-old man with pre-existing left upper extremity paralysis and new right hemiparesis after stroke demonstrated that intensive inpatient task-oriented training significantly improved Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores from 3 to 43 by 23 weeks, sustained at 41 at 1 year, facilitating functional independence.
items.curatedReason: 这例三肢瘫痪卒中患者的任务导向训练案例报告，展示了特定康复策略在复杂病例中的应用潜力。它提示你在处理罕见或复杂神经功能障碍时，应灵活调整治疗方案以促进功能独立。
items.titleZh: 三肢瘫痪患者的任务导向训练：卒中偏瘫并发对侧上肢原有麻痹：一个病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一例 75 岁患者，在原有左上肢麻痹基础上，卒中后出现右侧偏瘫。病例报告显示，强化住院任务导向训练显著改善了其 Fugl-Meyer 评定量表-上肢（FMA-UE）分数，从 3 分提高至 23 周时的 43 分，并在 1 年时维持在 41 分，促进了功能独立。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report of task-oriented training in a triplegia stroke patient demonstrates the potential application of specific rehabilitation strategies in complex cases. It suggests that you should flexibly adjust treatment plans to promote functional independence when dealing with rare or complex neurological impairments.
items.limitation: 单病例报告，结果无法推广到其他患者群体。
items.limitationEn: Single case report; results cannot be generalized to other patient populations.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Retrospective analysis of the relationship between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity
items.summary: This retrospective analysis investigated the relationship between post-stroke fatigue, a common chronic condition affecting 25-85% of stroke survivors, and aphasia severity. It notes that fatigue impacts quality of life and long-term outcomes and is not reliably predicted by stroke type or physical impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性分析探讨了卒中后疲劳与失语严重程度之间的关系，揭示了卒中康复中一个重要的共病问题。这提醒你在评估卒中患者时，应同时关注疲劳和失语，考虑它们对整体功能恢复的影响。
items.titleZh: 卒中后疲劳与失语严重程度关系的追溯分析
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性分析探讨了卒中后疲劳（一种影响 25-85% 卒中幸存者的常见慢性病症）与失语严重程度之间的关系。研究指出疲劳影响生活质量和长期预后，且无法通过卒中类型或伴随的身体损伤可靠预测。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective analysis explores the relationship between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity, revealing a significant comorbidity in stroke rehabilitation. This reminds you to concurrently address fatigue and aphasia when evaluating stroke patients, considering their impact on overall functional recovery.
items.limitation: 回顾性分析，可能存在数据收集偏倚和混杂因素；研究没有给出明确的方法和结果数据。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective analysis, potentially subject to data collection bias and confounding factors; the study did not provide clear methods and results data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Balance Stability Characteristics of Patients with Idiopathic Normal Pressure Hydrocephalus
items.summary: This study aimed to observe the postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究观察特发性正常压力脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题，有助于我们更深入理解这类患者的平衡障碍。这能指导你进行更精准的评估和针对性康复训练。
items.titleZh: 特发性正常压力脑积水患者的平衡稳定性特征
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在观察特发性正常压力脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study observing postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH) helps us better understand balance impairments in this population. This can guide you in performing more precise assessments and targeted rehabilitation training.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系；未报告具体样本量和研究方法细节，限制了对其结果的解读。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study and cannot establish causality; specific sample size and methodological details were not reported, limiting the interpretation of its results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: APTA, Hartford HealthCare Launch Frailty Pilot to Advance Value-Based Care
items.summary: APTA and Hartford HealthCare Rehabilitation Network launched a pilot to test an early frailty identification and intervention model, positioning physical therapists at the forefront of prevention-first care for aging populations and advancing value-based care.
items.curatedReason: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 合作推出的虚弱早期识别和干预试点项目，突显了物理治疗师在价值导向型医疗中预防虚弱的关键作用。关注这一模式的实施和证据收集，它可能成为你实践中推广预防性 PT 服务的新范式。
items.titleZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 启动虚弱试点项目，推进价值导向型护理
items.summaryZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 康复网络共同启动了一项试点项目，旨在测试虚弱早期识别和干预模型，将物理治疗师置于老年人口预防性护理的前沿，并推动价值导向型护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA-Hartford HealthCare pilot program for early frailty identification and intervention highlights the critical role of physical therapists in value-based care. Monitor its implementation and evidence collection; this model could become a new paradigm for promoting preventive PT services in your practice.

items.title: The effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults: a systematic review | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction (BFR-RE) on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults, identifying it as a promising strategy for those unable to perform high-intensity resistance exercise.
items.curatedReason: 对于无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年患者，血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）是一个值得推荐的有效策略。这份系统综述确认了 BFR-RE 在改善肌肉表现、增加肌肉量和功能方面的效果，你应该考虑将其纳入老年患者的训练方案。
items.titleZh: 血流限制抗阻训练对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述评估了血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响，认为这是一种对无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年人有前景的策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood flow restriction resistance exercise (BFR-RE) is an important strategy for improving muscle performance and function in older adults, especially those unable to perform high-intensity training. This systematic review evaluates the effects of BFR-RE, which can help you develop evidence-based training programs for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 综述的结论可能受限于纳入研究的异质性、方法学质量以及 BFR-RE 具体方案（如压力、时间、训练量）的差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of this review may be limited by the heterogeneity and methodological quality of included studies, as well as variations in BFR-RE protocols (e.g., pressure, duration, volume).

items.title: Frailty assessment and effect of physical activity interventions in older adults: a scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression
items.summary: This scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression evaluated frailty assessment and the effect of physical activity interventions in older adults, noting physical activity as a promising strategy to mitigate frailty despite heterogeneity in definitions and assessments.
items.curatedReason: 虚弱是老年人的重要健康问题，而体育活动是其重要的干预策略。这份系统综述、Meta 分析和 Meta 回归提供了虚弱评估和体育活动干预效果的全面证据，是你制定老年患者虚弱管理方案的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 老年人虚弱评估和体育活动干预效果：一项范围综述、Meta 分析和 Meta 回归
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述、Meta 分析和 Meta 回归评估了老年人虚弱的评估方法和体育活动干预的效果，指出体育活动是减轻虚弱的一种有前景的策略，尽管虚弱的定义和评估存在异质性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Frailty is a significant health issue in older adults, and physical activity is a crucial intervention strategy. This systematic review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression provide comprehensive evidence on frailty assessment and the effects of physical activity interventions, serving as an important reference for you to develop frailty management plans for older patients.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但体育活动干预方案的异质性以及虚弱定义和评估工具的多样性，可能影响结果的总体解释。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review, heterogeneity in physical activity intervention protocols and the diversity of frailty definitions and assessment tools may affect the overall interpretation of results.

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: This cross-sectional analysis of a population-based cohort (N=605) described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, female menstrual dysfunction, and male erectile and ejaculatory dysfunction, during primary spinal cord injury (SCI) rehabilitation in Switzerland.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者的性功能障碍是一个常被忽视但严重影响生活质量的领域。这份队列研究描述了 SCI 康复早期阶段性功能障碍的分布和风险因素，有助于你更全面地评估和讨论患者的康复需求。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初级康复期间的性功能：基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项基于人群队列的横断面分析（N=605）描述了瑞士脊髓损伤（SCI）患者在初级康复期间性功能障碍（包括性唤起改变、性高潮障碍、女性月经失调和男性勃起与射精功能障碍）的分布及风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sexual dysfunction in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) is an often-overlooked area that significantly impacts quality of life. This cohort study describes the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during early SCI rehabilitation, which can help you comprehensively assess and discuss patient rehabilitation needs.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立性功能障碍与 SCI 康复结果之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional analysis, precluding the establishment of causality between sexual dysfunction and SCI rehabilitation outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort
